== Notes for [[Item:Q100843|Q100843]] ==

[http://berdichevsky.tribalpages.com/family-tree/berdichevsky/1195/767/Joshua-HaLevi-Family '''Berdichevsky-Sokolka Families Tree - HaLevi Joshua''']

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8D7A4C1EFBBFA9822EF79916C5DCD
geni:6000000003700107932

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
